onboarding.profileTitle: Tell us a bit about yourself
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Everything is optional — skip anything you like.
onboarding.prefSub: This helps us personalise your recommendations.
onboarding.anythingPh: e.g. I prefer relaxed fits and natural fabrics.

home.inspReadySub: We'll combine pieces from your wardrobe into complete looks.
home.emptyDiscSub: Once your wardrobe has items, we start building outfits for you.

addChooser.wishlistDesc: Save items you love and want to buy later.
addChooser.wardrobeDesc: Add items you own to your wardrobe.

wishlistImport.title: Add to wishlist
wishlistImport.subtitle: Paste a product link from any store — we'll fetch the details, photo and price for you.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.pastePh: Paste a product link to save
wishlist.fetchNote: We'll fetch details and alerts for you.
wishlist.importInvalid: That link doesn't look valid — copy the full product address.
wishlist.importParseError: Couldn't read a product from that page. Try another link.
wishlist.importError: Import failed. Check your connection and try again.
wishlist.emptySub: Paste a link from any store to track price drops and restocks.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.emptySub: Snap a photo of any piece — we'll cut out the background and tag it for you.

discover.startSub: Pick an occasion and weather (optional), then tap Generate.
discover.composing: Your AI stylist is composing outfits…
discover.weatherHint: Tap to change, hold to detect
discover.locationBody: It's used only to fetch the local weather for outfit suggestions — nothing else. This is optional; you can always pick the weather manually.
discover.generationError: Couldn't generate outfits right now. Try again in a few minutes.
discover.completesSub: Real pieces that match what you have
discover.emptySub: Once your wardrobe has items, we start building outfits for you.

outfits.title: Saved outfits
outfits.emptySub: Generate looks and save the ones you like — they'll live here.

item.deleteBody: It will be removed from all collections too.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Organize your wardrobe with collections that fit your life.
collections.newCardDesc: Create a collection to organize your pieces.
collections.emptyBody: Open a piece and tick it into this collection.

you.title: You
you.preferencesDesc: Manage your style preferences, favorite brands and clothing sizes.
you.supportDesc: Get help, find answers and contact us.
you.settingsDesc: Manage your account, notifications and app settings.

prefs.title: Preferences
prefs.subtitle: Update your style preferences to get better recommendations.
prefs.notesPh: e.g. I love timeless pieces, clean silhouettes and high quality fabrics.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help you with anything you need.
support.helpCenterDesc: Find answers to common questions and how-to guides.
support.contactDesc: Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
support.feedbackDesc: Share your thoughts and help us improve.
support.valueBody: Your feedback helps us create a better experience for everyone.
support.feedbackPh: Tell us what you love or what we should improve…
support.feedbackThanks: Thank you! We read every message.

faq.q1: How do I add clothes to my wardrobe?
faq.a1: Tap the + button and choose Wardrobe, then photograph the piece. We remove the background and tag it automatically — you can edit everything before saving.
faq.a2: Paste a product link from any store (or share it to the app) and we fetch the photo, price and sizes. We then watch it for price drops and restocks.
faq.a3: Your AI stylist combines pieces from your wardrobe into complete looks, using your style preferences, the occasion and the weather.
faq.a4: Collections group your pieces however you like — Summer, Office, Gym. Open a piece to add it to a collection, or create new ones from the Collections screen.
faq.a5: Yes. Your photos and data are visible only to you, and you can delete your account and all data at any time from Settings.

notifications.priceDropDesc: Get notified when a wishlist item drops in price.
notifications.restockDesc: Get notified when a tracked size is back in stock.

about.title: About the App
about.body: Clothing Catalog brings all your favourite clothes into one app: your wardrobe, your wishlist and your style. Photograph what you own, save what you want from any store, and let your AI stylist turn them into outfits you'll actually wear.

terms.title: Terms & Policies
terms.termsBody: Use Clothing Catalog for personal, non-commercial purposes. You are responsible for the content you add. The service is provided as-is while in early access; features may change. Full terms will be published before public release.
terms.privacyBody: Your photos and data belong to you and are visible only to you. We store them securely with our hosting provider and use them only to provide app features — never for advertising. Product links you import are fetched to read public product details. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiDesc: Download a model for unlimited tagging
settings.deleteAccountBody: All your pieces, collections and data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

localAi.title: On-device AI
localAi.intro: Download a model to run AI on this phone: unlimited tagging, photos never leave your device, works offline.
localAi.qualityNote: The cloud model stays slightly more accurate; on-device is best for unlimited everyday use.
localAi.deleteBody: You can download it again anytime.
localAi.needsRam: Needs a phone with at least {{gb}} GB RAM
localAi.noSpaceBody: Free up some space and try again.
localAi.cellularBody: This is a {{size}} GB download. Wi-Fi is recommended.
